name: US Dollar vs Canadian Dollar

personality.summary: A North-American-hours pair. Nearly dead in Asia, wakes up in London, delivers its real range during the NY session (14:30-22:00 SAST). Choppy and mean-reverting inside ranges, but produces fast impulsive legs when oil moves or on NY-session momentum. Notorious for false breakouts outside NY hours.
personality.spread_behavior: Tight in NY, moderate in London, wide and jumpy 00:00-05:00 SAST
typical_moves: Asian session: 15-25 pip drift, structureless - avoid
London: positions build, often a false directional move
NY open 14:30-16:00 SAST: true direction of the day, largest hourly candles
Inverse correlation with oil (CAD is a petro-currency): strong oil trend days = strong USDCAD trend days

key_technicals.moving_averages: H1 200 EMA is the macro line in the sand; M15 9/21 EMA cross works well ONLY during NY hours
key_technicals.pivots: Classic daily pivots (P, R1, S1) are respected unusually well in the NY session
key_technicals.round_numbers: Every 0.0050 level matters; 1.3500-type levels are major battlegrounds
key_technicals.range_behavior: Multi-day ranges are common - mark the weekly high/low and fade edges until a confirmed D1 close breaks out
key_technicals.rsi: M15 RSI divergence at range extremes during NY is a high-quality reversal signal on this pair

scalping_plan.sessions: NY session ONLY: 14:30-20:00 SAST (London 10:00-12:00 acceptable but lower quality)

steps: At/after 14:30, wait for M5 break + retest of the range edge
Enter on retest rejection candle in breakout direction
SL beyond retest wick, TP 1:1.5, move to breakeven at 1R
On non-trending days (price between daily P and R1/S1)
Fade first touch of R1/S1 with M5 rejection candle + RSI extreme
SL 12-15 pips beyond pivot, TP back at daily pivot P

scalping_plan.risk: Targets 8-15 pips. Skip scalping on Canadian data days at 14:30 SAST (jobs/CPI) and oil inventory Wednesdays 16:30 SAST until the spike settles.

day_trading_plan.model: NY-session trend day off H1 structure
steps: H1 bias + oil direction check (aligned oil trend increases conviction)
Entry on M15 pullback to 21 EMA / order block after NY-open impulse
SL beyond pullback, first target daily R1/S1, runner to PDH/PDL

after_hours_00_05_sast.conditions: Worst pair on your list for this window. Both USD and CAD home markets are closed. Volume is minimal, spreads widen, price drifts in 10-20 pip noise.
after_hours_00_05_sast.verdict: DO NOT TRADE USDCAD from 00:00-05:00 SAST.
what_to_do_instead: Mark the overnight range - its extremes become NY-session liquidity targets
Prepare pivot levels and note oil's overnight direction for tomorrow's bias

invalidations_and_traps: Asian/London breakouts of the daily range fail far more often than they succeed - wait for NY
Fast CAD-news spikes (14:30 SAST) fully retrace more often than on other pairs - never chase the spike candle
If oil and USDCAD are moving the same direction (both up), the USDCAD move is suspect - lower conviction
